issue_summary: Better NPE messages in CollectionUtils with Objects.requireNonNull
javadoc_before:
/** * Returns a {@link Collection} containing the union of the given * {@link Iterable}s. *

* The cardinality of each element in the returned {@link Collection} will * be equal to the maximum of the cardinality of that element in the two * given {@link Iterable}s. *

* * @param a the first collection, must not be null * @param b the second collection, must not be null * @param the generic type that is able to represent the types contained * in both input collections. * @return the union of the two collections * @see Collection#addAll */
javadoc_after:
/** * Returns a {@link Collection} containing the union of the given * {@link Iterable}s. *

* The cardinality of each element in the returned {@link Collection} will * be equal to the maximum of the cardinality of that element in the two * given {@link Iterable}s. *

* * @param a the first collection, must not be null * @param b the second collection, must not be null * @param the generic type that is able to represent the types contained * in both input collections. * @return the union of the two collections * @throws NullPointerException if either collection is null * @see Collection#addAll */
